privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated historical standup notes injected by setup_task.sh. All expected string parameters (dashboard title 'Scrum Dashboard', template title 'Standup Template', tag 'Standup', and inserted text 'Configured the automated standup generator.') have been verified against the explicit string matches required in export_result.sh and verifier.py.
